subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Cause of God! Blessed art thou that thou hast shown forth constancy in the Cause of God and in the Faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استقام فی امر الله خوشا بحال تو که در امر الله استقامت نمودى و در دین
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
